# uptime_cloudstatus_services (Data Source)

Look up Cloud Status services within a provider group. Use the returned `id` values to populate `services` on a `uptime_check_cloudstatus` resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `group` (String) Provider group ID or case-insensitive name substring. Strongly recommended because the services list is large; without it you will fetch every service across every provider.
- `search` (String) Case-insensitive substring matched against service name, title, or sub-title

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source
- `services` (Attributes List) Matching Cloud Status services (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--services))

<a id="nestedatt--services"></a>
### Nested Schema for `services`

Read-Only:

- `group` (String) Name of the provider group this service belongs to
- `group_id` (Number) ID of the provider group this service belongs to
- `id` (Number) Unique identifier for the service
- `name` (String) Internal name (slug) for the service
- `sub_title` (String) Optional secondary title (e.g., region/zone)
- `title` (String) Human-readable service title
